_comment: Per-city policy caps. Seeded into the 'policies' MongoDB collection by scripts/seed-mongodb.ts. handbookExcerpt is the text embedded by Gemini for Atlas Vector Search.

cities.handbookExcerpt: Milan travel policy: hotel cap $200/night, flight cap $1,500, meal allowance $75/day. Preferred transport: company car or rideshare. Any hotel over $200/night requires manager approval.
London travel policy: hotel cap $250/night, flight cap $1,200, meal allowance $85/day. Preferred transport: black cab or Heathrow Express. Approval required above $250/night.
Paris travel policy: hotel cap $220/night, flight cap $1,200, meal allowance $80/day. RER B from CDG recommended. Approval required above $220/night.
Tokyo travel policy: hotel cap $180/night, flight cap $2,200, meal allowance $70/day. Narita Express is preferred transport. Approval required above $180/night.
Toronto travel policy: hotel cap $175/night, flight cap $800, meal allowance $65/day. Union Pearson Express recommended from YYZ. Approval required above $175/night.
Mexico City travel policy: hotel cap $140/night, flight cap $600, meal allowance $50/day. Company car strongly preferred for safety. Approval required above $140/night.
